inside_official_interval_null_semantics: null for training, Normal, external-task, and not-yet-mapped rows; boolean is required for mapped anomalous UCF test rows
quarantine_semantics: Keep unresolved source-video mappings outside compliant manifests in a separate quarantine report.

teacher_resolution.checkpoint_identity: Store exact checkpoint/version/digest in the provenance record referenced by the run or derived artifact.
